title: Nostalgic Umami Dense Grapefruit Stir-fry
description: A Dutch-inspired dish featuring grapefruit juice with a hint of umami, perfect for breakfast or snack time. Sugar-free and low-sodium.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fresh grapefruit segments
ingredients.notes: Use the juice if you prefer a sweeter version

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Replace with fish sauce or Worcestershire sauce for umami flavor

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon honey (optional)
ingredients.notes: Reduce sweetness by omitting this ingredient

ingredients.name: Pinch of red pepper flakes
ingredients.notes: For a bit of heat and spice

instructions: Combine grapefruit segments with soy sauce in a bowl. Add optional honey and red pepper flakes for desired sweetness and heat.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Stir in minced garlic and ginger, cooking until fragrant but not browned.
Pour the grapefruit mixture into the skillet and stir to combine. Simmer for about 5 minutes or until thickened slightly.
Serve warm as a snack or with toast or crackers.
